title: oxalis deserticola
intro: Oxalis deserticola, also known as Desert Wood Sorrel, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxalis deserticola include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Oxalis deserticola can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied topically to wounds.
